tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service - Community Board 8 Presentation

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Brooklyn Community Board 8

Upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS on Utica Avenue corridor. Includes off-board fare collection, dedicated bus lanes extension south of Church Avenue, transit signal priority, service changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.
Proposed B46 SBS, upgraded from B46 Limited
B46 Local generally travels between Kings Plaza and DeKalb Ave
B46 LTD generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza. Makes all local stops north of DeKalb Ave and south of Ave H, and limited stops between DeKalb Ave and Ave H.

The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study. Second-busiest bus route in NYC, carrying nearly 50,000 passengers per day. Crucial connection to 3 4 A C trains and 30 bus routes. Bus lanes implemented in 2014 in portion of corridor.
Off-board fare collection as part of B46 SBS upgrade
